prompt_zh: 你在星巴克，想点一杯热美式，不加糖。
prompt_en: You're at Starbucks. Order a hot Americano, no sugar.
culture_tip: In China, the barista might ask '要大杯还是中杯？' — 'Grande or medium?' Chinese Starbucks sizes work differently!
prompt_pinyin: Nǐ zài Xīngbākè, xiǎng diǎn yì bēi rè měishì, bù jiā táng.

prompt_zh: 出租车司机问你去哪里，告诉他你要去最近的地铁站。
prompt_en: The taxi driver asks where you're going. Tell him you want to go to the nearest metro station.
culture_tip: 师傅 (shī fu) is the respectful way to address a taxi driver — works for both male and female drivers.
prompt_pinyin: Chūzū chē sījī wèn nǐ qù nǎlǐ, gàosu tā nǐ yào qù zuìjìn de dìtiě zhàn.

prompt_zh: 你在餐馆，想问服务员有没有不辣的菜。
prompt_en: You're at a restaurant. Ask the waiter if they have any non-spicy dishes.
culture_tip: '不要辣' literally means 'don't want spicy.' In Sichuan, even '微辣' (slightly spicy) can be intense!
prompt_pinyin: Nǐ zài cānguǎn, xiǎng wèn fúwùyuán yǒu méiyǒu bú là de cài.

prompt_zh: 你的中国同事问你周末做了什么，告诉他你去爬山了。
prompt_en: Your Chinese colleague asks what you did this weekend. Tell them you went hiking.
prompt_pinyin: Nǐ de Zhōngguó tóngshì wèn nǐ zhōumò zuò le shénme, gàosu tā nǐ qù pá shān le.

prompt_zh: 你在菜市场买水果，问老板西瓜多少钱一斤。
prompt_en: You're at the fruit market. Ask the vendor how much watermelon costs per jin (500g).
culture_tip: China uses 斤 (jīn) not kilograms for produce. 1 斤 = 500 grams. '多少钱一斤？' is the magic phrase!
prompt_pinyin: Nǐ zài càishìchǎng mǎi shuǐguǒ, wèn lǎobǎn xīguā duōshao qián yì jīn.

prompt_zh: 你感冒了，去药店买感冒药，告诉店员你的症状。
prompt_en: You have a cold. Go to the pharmacy and describe your symptoms to buy cold medicine.
prompt_pinyin: Nǐ gǎnmào le, qù yàodiàn mǎi gǎnmào yào, gàosu diànyuán nǐ de zhèngzhuàng.

prompt_zh: 你要迟到了，给同事发微信说你在路上，大概还要20分钟。
prompt_en: You're running late. Send a WeChat message saying you're on the way, about 20 more minutes.
culture_tip: '在路上了' is the universal Chinese excuse — everyone uses it, even if they haven't left yet!
prompt_pinyin: Nǐ yào chídào le, gěi tóngshì fā wēixìn shuō nǐ zài lùshang, dàgài hái yào èrshí fēnzhōng.

prompt_zh: 商务晚宴上，你的中国合作伙伴给你倒酒，你想礼貌地拒绝。
prompt_en: At a business dinner, your Chinese partner pours you a drink. Politely decline.
culture_tip: '不好意思，我明天一早有飞机' is a face-saving excuse that works perfectly.
prompt_pinyin: Shāngwù wǎnyàn shàng, nǐ de hézuò huǒbàn gěi nǐ dào jiǔ, nǐ xiǎng lǐmào de jùjué.

prompt_zh: 你想在淘宝上买东西，问中国朋友怎么用。
prompt_en: You want to buy something on Taobao. Ask your Chinese friend how to use it.
prompt_pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng zài Táobǎo shàng mǎi dōngxi, wèn Zhōngguó péngyou zěnme yòng.

prompt_zh: 打电话给房东，告诉他空调坏了，请他找人来修。
prompt_en: Call your landlord — the AC is broken. Ask them to send someone to fix it.
culture_tip: '坏了' (huài le) means 'broken' and works for anything: TV坏了, 手机坏了, 空调坏了.
prompt_pinyin: Dǎ diànhuà gěi fángdōng, gàosu tā kōngtiáo huài le, qǐng tā zhǎo rén lái xiū.

prompt_zh: 春节到了，给你的中国朋友发一条拜年的微信。
prompt_en: It's Chinese New Year! Send a festive greeting to your Chinese friend.
culture_tip: 新年快乐，万事如意 adds warmth. For elders, add 身体健康 (good health).

prompt_zh: 你在网上看到一个很搞笑的视频，想用中文描述给朋友听。
prompt_en: You saw a hilarious video online. Describe it to your friend in Chinese.

prompt_zh: 你的中国朋友问你家乡的天气怎么样，跟中国比有什么不同。
prompt_en: Your friend asks about the weather in your hometown vs China.
culture_tip: '阴天' (yīn tiān) means overcast. In Shanghai, you'll use this word a LOT!

prompt_zh: 你要搬家了，需要叫一辆搬家公司的车。打电话预约。
prompt_en: You're moving. Call a moving company to book a truck.

prompt_zh: 在公司会议上，用中文介绍你负责的项目进展。
prompt_en: In a meeting, present your project progress in Chinese.

prompt_zh: 你上了出租车，告诉司机你要去火车站，问大概多少钱。
prompt_en: Get in a taxi. Tell the driver: train station. Ask the fare.
culture_tip: '大概多少钱？' (about how much?) — useful when you don't have the DiDi app.

prompt_zh: 你有一个大行李箱，请出租车司机帮你打开后备箱。
prompt_en: You have a big suitcase. Ask the driver to open the trunk.
culture_tip: '能帮我吗？' — 'Can you help me?' People are generally very willing to help!

prompt_zh: 到了目的地，你想用微信支付，问司机可不可以。
prompt_en: You've arrived. Ask if you can pay with WeChat Pay.
culture_tip: Almost everywhere accepts WeChat Pay. Some vendors prefer it over Alipay.

prompt_zh: 你在餐馆，想让服务员推荐他们的招牌菜。
prompt_en: At a restaurant, ask the waiter to recommend their signature dish.
culture_tip: '招牌菜' means signature dish. '你有什么推荐菜吗？' is the magic phrase.

prompt_zh: 你不能吃辣，但朋友带你去了川菜馆，告诉服务员你的需求。
prompt_en: You can't eat spicy but you're at a Sichuan restaurant. Tell the waiter.
culture_tip: 5 basic flavors: 酸甜苦辣咸 (sour, sweet, bitter, spicy, salty). Say '我不吃辣'.

prompt_zh: 你去看牙医，需要描述牙什么时候开始疼、是什么样的疼。
prompt_en: At the dentist. Describe when your tooth started hurting and what kind of pain.
culture_tip: '刺痛' = sharp pain, '酸痛' = dull ache. Describing pain precisely is great practice!

prompt_zh: 今天是阴天，你的中国同事跟你聊天气，用中文回应。
prompt_en: It's overcast. Your colleague chats about the weather. Respond in Chinese.

prompt_zh: 清明节快到了，你的中国朋友要回老家，问他清明节是什么意思。
prompt_en: Qingming Festival is coming. Ask your friend what it means.
culture_tip: During 4 major holidays — highways are FREE. That's why massive traffic jams happen!

prompt_zh: 你想用支付宝的花呗功能，问中国朋友花呗是怎么用的。
prompt_en: Ask your friend how Alipay's Huabei credit feature works.
culture_tip: 花呗 is like a built-in credit card. Pay this month, repay next month — zero interest if paid in full!

prompt_zh: 你按摩的时候，按摩师问你舒不舒服，用中文回答。
prompt_en: During a massage, the masseuse asks if you're comfortable. Answer.
culture_tip: 师傅/沙发/舒服 sound similar but mean master/sofa/comfortable. Don't mix them up!

prompt_zh: 你想跟朋友说上海很大，想想中文需不需要用'是'。
prompt_en: Tell your friend Shanghai is big. Think: do you need a 'be' verb?
culture_tip: Adjectives don't use 是! Say '上海大' or '上海很大' — NOT '上海是大'. Only nouns need 是.

prompt_zh: 练习说'我妈妈'和'我的公司'，想想什么时候可以省略'的'。
prompt_en: Practice 'my mom' vs 'my company'. When can you drop '的'?
culture_tip: Family: skip 的 (我妈, 我爸). Things: keep it (我的公司, 我的手机). Sounds more natural!

prompt_zh: 你和朋友去吃火锅，想要鸳鸯锅，用中文点。
prompt_en: Ordering hotpot. Get a yuan-yang pot (half spicy, half mild).
culture_tip: '鸳鸯锅' means 'mandarin duck pot' — the diplomatic solution for mixed spice tolerance!

prompt_zh: 中国朋友向你推荐皮蛋，你从没吃过，问他这是什么做的。
prompt_en: Your friend recommends century egg. Ask what it's made of.
culture_tip: 皮蛋 is duck egg preserved in a special mixture. Often served as a cold appetizer with vinegar.

prompt_zh: 向外国朋友解释中国高铁有多快多方便。
prompt_en: Explain how fast and convenient China's high-speed rail is.
culture_tip: Shanghai→Hangzhou by high-speed rail: ~1 hour. Chinese say '坐高铁' like Americans say 'take an Uber'.

prompt_zh: 你想去理发店剪头发，告诉理发师你想要什么发型。
prompt_en: At the barber. Tell them what hairstyle you want.
culture_tip: '剪短一点' (jiǎn duǎn yì diǎn) means 'cut shorter.' Be specific or you might get a surprise!

prompt_zh: 你在超市，想找牛奶在哪里，问工作人员。
prompt_en: At the supermarket. Ask staff where to find milk.
culture_tip: '请问，牛奶在哪里？' — starting with 请问 (may I ask) is more polite than jumping straight to the question.

prompt_zh: 你的手机没电了，想问咖啡店有没有充电宝。
prompt_en: Your phone is dying. Ask the café if they have a power bank.
culture_tip: 共享充电宝 (shared power banks) are everywhere in China — just scan the QR code to rent one!

prompt_zh: 你收到一个快递，但你不在家，用中文给快递员打电话。
prompt_en: A delivery is coming but you're not home. Call the courier.
culture_tip: '放在门口' (put it at the door) or '放在快递柜' (put it in the locker) are common instructions.

prompt_zh: 你想办一张中国银行卡，去银行问需要什么材料。
prompt_en: You want to open a Chinese bank account. Ask what documents you need.
culture_tip: You'll need your passport + proof of address. Say '我想开一个银行账户' (I want to open a bank account).

prompt_zh: 你和中国朋友讨论AI技术对生活的影响。
prompt_en: Discuss with your Chinese friend how AI technology affects daily life.
culture_tip: China is one of the most AI-integrated societies. '人工智能' (rén gōng zhì néng) = artificial intelligence.

prompt_zh: 你想请假，给老板发微信说明原因。
prompt_en: You need to take time off. Send your boss a WeChat message explaining why.
culture_tip: '请假' (qǐng jià) = request leave. Be formal: '领导您好，我想请一天假...' (Leader, hello, I'd like to request one day off...)

prompt_zh: 你在中国过中秋节，朋友送了你月饼，用中文感谢并聊聊这个节日。
prompt_en: It's Mid-Autumn Festival. Your friend gives you mooncakes. Thank them and chat about the holiday.
culture_tip: 中秋节 is about family reunion. '月亮代表我的心' (the moon represents my heart) is a famous song!

prompt_zh: 你去健身房，想问教练这个器械怎么用。
prompt_en: At the gym. Ask the trainer how to use a machine.
culture_tip: '这个怎么用？' (how do you use this?) works for any unfamiliar device or machine.

prompt_zh: 你的中国朋友邀请你去KTV唱歌，你想选一首中文歌。
prompt_en: Your friend invites you to KTV. You want to pick a Chinese song.
culture_tip: 周杰伦 (Jay Chou) songs are KTV classics. '告白气球' is easy for beginners!

prompt_zh: 你在路上看到一个很有意思的店，想进去看看，问营业时间。
prompt_en: You see an interesting shop. Ask about their opening hours.
culture_tip: '几点开门？几点关门？' (what time open? what time close?) — simple and effective.

prompt_zh: 你想租房子，在中介那里描述你的需求（位置、价格、大小）。
prompt_en: Looking for an apartment. Describe your needs to a real estate agent.
culture_tip: '一室一厅' = one bedroom + living room. Rent is usually quoted per month: '每月多少钱？'

prompt_zh: 你在地铁里，有人踩了你的脚，用中文处理这个情况。
prompt_en: Someone steps on your foot in the subway. Handle the situation in Chinese.
culture_tip: '没关系' (méi guān xi) = no worries/it's fine. Chinese people use this phrase A LOT.

prompt_zh: 你想给中国朋友介绍你家乡的一道特色菜。
prompt_en: Introduce a signature dish from your hometown to your Chinese friend.

prompt_zh: 你在网上买了东西想退货，联系客服说明原因。
prompt_en: You want to return an online purchase. Contact customer service.
culture_tip: '我想退货' (I want to return it). On Taobao, the 7-day no-reason return policy is '七天无理由退货'.

prompt_zh: 你坐高铁去杭州，跟旁边的中国乘客聊天。
prompt_en: On a high-speed train to Hangzhou. Chat with the Chinese passenger next to you.
culture_tip: '你也去杭州吗？' is a natural conversation opener. Train rides are great for language practice!

prompt_zh: 你想知道为什么中国人见面总问'吃了吗'，问你的中文老师。
prompt_en: Ask your teacher why Chinese people always greet with '吃了吗?' (Have you eaten?).
culture_tip: '吃了吗' isn't really about food — it's a way of saying 'how are you?' from an era when food was scarce.

prompt_zh: 你第一次参加中国同事的婚礼，问朋友该注意什么礼仪。
prompt_en: You're attending a Chinese colleague's wedding. Ask about etiquette.
culture_tip: Red envelope (红包) with even amounts of money is standard. Never give amounts with 4 — it sounds like 'death'.

prompt_zh: 你的中国朋友问你为什么学中文，用中文回答。
prompt_en: Your friend asks why you're learning Chinese. Answer in Chinese.

prompt_zh: 在中国的便利店，你想买早餐，问有没有包子和豆浆。
prompt_en: At a convenience store for breakfast. Ask if they have baozi and soy milk.
culture_tip: 包子 (bāo zi) + 豆浆 (dòu jiāng) is the classic Chinese breakfast combo. Cheap and filling!

prompt_zh: 你想在微信上加一个新认识的中国朋友，怎么说？
prompt_en: You want to add a new Chinese friend on WeChat. How do you ask?
culture_tip: '可以加你微信吗？' (Can I add you on WeChat?) is the Chinese equivalent of exchanging phone numbers.

prompt_zh: 你的中国同事抱怨堵车，你们一起聊聊北京的交通。
prompt_en: Your colleague complains about traffic. Chat about Beijing's traffic situation.
culture_tip: '高峰期' (gāo fēng qī) = rush hour. Beijing traffic is legendary — people spend hours commuting.

prompt_zh: 你想在饭店AA制，怎么跟中国朋友说？
prompt_en: You want to split the bill. How do you suggest this to Chinese friends?
culture_tip: 'AA制' or '我们AA吧' means split the bill. But be aware — in Chinese culture, fighting to pay the bill is common and expected!

prompt_zh: 你在中国看到'扫码点餐'的牌子，但不知道怎么操作，问服务员。
prompt_en: You see a 'scan to order' sign but don't know how. Ask the waiter.
culture_tip: Almost all restaurants now use QR codes for ordering. WeChat or Alipay scan works.

prompt_zh: 你想了解中国的户口制度，问你的中文老师。
prompt_en: Ask your teacher about China's hukou (household registration) system.
culture_tip: 户口 affects where you can access public services. It's one of the most impactful systems in Chinese society.

prompt_zh: 你在商场试衣服，想问有没有大一号的。
prompt_en: Trying on clothes at a mall. Ask if they have a larger size.
culture_tip: '有没有大一号的？' Chinese sizes run smaller than Western sizes. Always try before buying!

prompt_zh: 你的中国朋友给你看了一个搞笑的抖音视频，用中文评价。
prompt_en: Your friend shows you a funny Douyin (TikTok) video. Comment on it in Chinese.
culture_tip: '太好笑了！' (too funny!), '笑死我了' (dying of laughter) — express yourself!

prompt_zh: 你在中国坐公交车，但不知道在哪一站下车，问旁边的人。
prompt_en: On a bus but unsure which stop to get off. Ask someone nearby.
culture_tip: '请问，到XX站还有几站？' (excuse me, how many stops to XX?) is your lifesaver on public transit.

prompt_zh: 你想学做一道中国菜，请中国朋友教你做番茄炒蛋。
prompt_en: Ask your Chinese friend to teach you how to make tomato scrambled eggs.
culture_tip: 番茄炒蛋 (tomato scrambled eggs) is THE Chinese home cooking starter dish. Every Chinese person knows this recipe!

prompt_zh: 你到中国后发现很多APP需要中国手机号，跟朋友抱怨这个问题。
prompt_en: After arriving in China, many apps require a Chinese phone number. Complain to your friend.
culture_tip: Getting a Chinese SIM card should be priority #1 when arriving. You need it for WeChat Pay, DiDi, Meituan — basically everything.

prompt_zh: 你想预约一个中文考试（HSK），在网上填写报名信息。
prompt_en: Register for an HSK exam online. Practice the vocabulary needed.
culture_tip: HSK (汉语水平考试) has 6 levels. Most jobs in China require HSK 4+.

prompt_zh: 你在中国旅行，想问当地人有什么好玩的地方推荐。
prompt_en: Traveling in China. Ask a local to recommend fun places to visit.
culture_tip: '这附近有什么好玩的吗？' (Is there anything fun nearby?) — locals love recommending hidden gems!

prompt_zh: 你想了解龟苓膏是什么，问你的中国朋友。
prompt_en: Ask your friend about guilinggao (herbal jelly) — what is it made of?
culture_tip: Originally made from turtle shell + Chinese herbs. Now mostly synthetic. Cantonese people love it in summer for 'cooling down' the body.

prompt_zh: 你在中国被问'你是哪里人'，用中文介绍你的国家和城市。
prompt_en: Someone asks '你是哪里人?' Introduce your country and city in Chinese.

prompt_zh: 你的中国同事加班到很晚，用中文安慰他/她。
prompt_en: Your colleague is working overtime very late. Comfort them in Chinese.
culture_tip: '辛苦了' (xīn kǔ le) literally means 'you've worked hard' — it's the go-to phrase to acknowledge someone's effort.

prompt_zh: 你在外卖APP上点餐，想跟骑手说把外卖放在门口。
prompt_en: Ordering food delivery. Tell the rider to leave it at the door.
culture_tip: '放在门口就好' (just leave it at the door). Meituan and Ele.me are the two main delivery apps.

prompt_zh: 你想跟中国朋友解释你们国家的一个有趣的文化习惯。
prompt_en: Explain an interesting cultural custom from your country to a Chinese friend.

prompt_zh: 你在蚂蚁森林种了一棵树，跟朋友炫耀。
prompt_en: You planted a tree on Ant Forest! Brag about it to your friend.
culture_tip: 蚂蚁森林 turns Alipay spending into virtual 'energy' that plants real trees in deserts. China has planted millions!

prompt_zh: 你在中国生病了想请病假，跟老板解释情况。
prompt_en: You're sick and need to call in sick. Explain the situation to your boss.
culture_tip: '我今天身体不舒服，想请一天病假' — be straightforward. Chinese bosses appreciate direct communication.

prompt_zh: 你在菜市场，想买一斤鸡蛋，用中文跟老板讲价。
prompt_en: At the market, buy 1 jin of eggs and try to bargain.
culture_tip: '便宜一点吧！' (cheaper please!) is the classic bargaining phrase. Markets expect negotiation!

prompt_zh: 你想跟中国朋友讨论最近中国近视率很高的问题。
prompt_en: Discuss with your friend why so many Chinese people are nearsighted.
culture_tip: China has the world's highest myopia rate — over 80% of students. Education pressure + screen time are main causes.

prompt_zh: 你在中国用滴滴叫了拼车，车上还有一个人，打个招呼。
prompt_en: You ordered a DiDi shared ride. There's another passenger. Say hello.
culture_tip: '拼车' (pīn chē) = shared ride, much cheaper. '你好，也去那个方向吗？' is a natural greeting.

prompt_zh: 你想了解毛豆腐是什么，虽然看起来有点奇怪。
prompt_en: Ask about 'hairy tofu' — what is it and is it safe to eat?
culture_tip: 毛豆腐 is fermented tofu with fuzzy mold — like blue cheese. Tastes better than it looks! Healthy for digestion.

prompt_zh: 你在中国第一次用手机扫码骑共享单车。
prompt_en: First time using a bike-sharing app in China. Scan and ride!
culture_tip: 哈啰单车, 美团单车 are the main bike-sharing services. Just scan the QR code on the bike to unlock!

prompt_zh: 你的中国朋友问你对中国火腿和西班牙火腿有什么看法。
prompt_en: Compare Chinese ham with Spanish ham. What are the differences?
culture_tip: Chinese ham is much saltier — used for soup, never eaten raw. Spanish jamón is cured for eating directly.

prompt_zh: 你想知道为什么中国人叫美国'美国'，问你的中文老师。
prompt_en: Ask why China calls America '美国' (beautiful country).
culture_tip: Most country names in Chinese are phonetic transliterations: 美 (měi) ≈ 'Ame-', not literally 'beautiful'!

prompt_zh: 你在中国的地铁站，需要给交通卡充值。
prompt_en: At a subway station. You need to top up your transit card.
culture_tip: '充值' (chōng zhí) = top up/recharge. Works for transit cards, phone plans, game accounts — everything!

prompt_zh: 你想在中国办一张手机卡，去营业厅问套餐和价格。
prompt_en: Get a Chinese SIM card. Ask about plans and pricing at the telecom shop.
culture_tip: China Mobile (中国移动), China Unicom (中国联通), China Telecom (中国电信) are the three carriers.

prompt_zh: 你的中国同事升职了，用中文恭喜他。
prompt_en: Your colleague got promoted. Congratulate them in Chinese.
culture_tip: '恭喜恭喜！升职加薪！' (Congratulations! Promotion and raise!) is the classic celebratory phrase.

prompt_zh: 你在中国被邀请去同事家吃饭，问该带什么礼物。
prompt_en: Invited to a colleague's home for dinner. Ask what gift to bring.
culture_tip: Fruit or milk is the safe choice. Never bring clocks (谐音'送终'). Even numbers are lucky, avoid 4.

prompt_zh: 你想知道中国的五一劳动节有什么传统活动。
prompt_en: Ask about Labor Day (五一) traditions and activities in China.
culture_tip: 五一 is 5 days off — Chinese people travel EVERYWHERE. Book hotels early or stay home!

prompt_zh: 你在中国看到了一个很有趣的广告牌，拍照发朋友圈。
prompt_en: You see a funny billboard in China. Post it on your WeChat Moments.
culture_tip: 朋友圈 (Moments) is the Chinese Instagram. '朋友圈' literally means 'friend circle'.

prompt_zh: 你和中国朋友讨论中国蓝领工人短缺的问题。
prompt_en: Discuss the blue-collar worker shortage in China with your friend.
culture_tip: China faces a paradox: university graduates struggle to find work while factories can't find enough workers.

prompt_zh: 你想在美团上点奶茶外卖，选配料和甜度。
prompt_en: Order bubble tea on Meituan. Choose toppings and sweetness level.
culture_tip: '三分甜' (30% sugar), '半糖' (half sugar), '去冰' (no ice). Customize everything!

prompt_zh: 你在中国发现很多年轻人都在用AI工具，跟朋友讨论。
prompt_en: Discuss how many young Chinese people use AI tools in daily life.
culture_tip: 豆包, Kimi, 通义千问 are popular Chinese AI assistants — China has its own thriving AI ecosystem!

prompt_zh: 你想学习用中文说时间：现在几点？下午三点半。
prompt_en: Practice telling time in Chinese. What time is it now?
culture_tip: '现在几点？' = What time? '三点半' = 3:30. Chinese uses 半 (half) instead of 'thirty'.

prompt_zh: 你第一次坐中国的网约车，手机没电了导航不能用，用中文给司机指路。
prompt_en: First ride-hailing experience — your phone died. Give directions verbally.
culture_tip: '前面' (front), '左转' (left turn), '右转' (right turn), '停在这里' (stop here) — your survival toolkit!

prompt_zh: 你想跟中国朋友解释什么是你们国家的'comfort food'。
prompt_en: Explain the concept of 'comfort food' from your country.

prompt_zh: 你在中国签了新的工作合同，跟朋友分享这个好消息。
prompt_en: You signed a new work contract in China. Share the good news!
culture_tip: '我签了新合同！' Chinese colleagues will say '恭喜恭喜！请客请客！' (Congrats! You're treating us to dinner!)

prompt_zh: 回顾你学中文的旅程：用中文描述你最大的进步和最难的挑战。
prompt_en: Reflect on your Chinese learning journey. What's your biggest progress and hardest challenge?
culture_tip: After 90 days, you've built a habit. '坚持就是胜利' (persistence is victory) — you made it!
